start_message:
рЯСЛ Hello {name}!

рЯОµ I'm **{bot_name}** вАФ a feature-rich voice chat music bot.

Use /help to see all commands.
help_message:
рЯУЦ **Commands**

рЯОµ **Playback**
`/play <query|link>` вАФ Play a song
`/pause` вАФ Pause playback
`/resume` вАФ Resume playback
`/skip` вАФ Skip current track
`/stop` вАФ Stop and clear queue
`/seek <seconds>` вАФ Seek in track

рЯУЛ **Queue**
`/queue` вАФ Show current queue
`/shuffle` вАФ Shuffle queue
`/clearqueue` вАФ Clear the queue
`/remove <position>` вАФ Remove a track

вЪЩпЄП **Settings**
`/volume <1-200>` вАФ Set volume
`/loop` вАФ Toggle loop mode
`/settings` вАФ Chat settings

рЯУЭ **Extras**
`/lyrics [query]` вАФ Get lyrics
`/playlist` вАФ Manage playlists
`/ping` вАФ Check bot latency
stopped: вПє Playback stopped and queue cleared.
no_active_stream: вЭМ No active stream in this chat.
not_in_vc: вЭМ Join a voice chat first, then use this command.
volume_invalid: вЭМ Volume must be between 1 and 200.
admin_only: рЯФР This command is for admins only.
owner_only: рЯФР This command is for the bot owner only.
rate_limited: вП≥ Slow down! Try again in a few seconds.
error_generic: вЭМ An error occurred. Please try again.
queue_finished: вЬЕ Queue finished. No more tracks to play.
spotify_track: рЯОµ Spotify track detected. Fetching from YouTube...
spotify_playlist: рЯОґ Spotify playlist ({count} tracks) вАФ adding to queue...
settings_menu:
вЪЩпЄП **Settings вАФ {chat}**

Configure how the bot behaves in this chat.
playlist_loaded: рЯУВ Playlist **{name}** loaded вАФ {count} tracks added to queue.
no_playlists: рЯУ≠ You have no saved playlists.
autoplay_on: рЯ§Ц AutoPlay: **On** вАФ related songs will play automatically.
ping_response:
рЯПУ Pong!

вЪ° Latency: **{latency}ms**
рЯ§Ц Uptime: **{uptime}**
